meaning: n.广度,宽度,长度,范围,程度,区域,[律]<英>扣押,<美>临时所有权令
examples: That's true, to a certain extent.
To some extent this was the truth.
The extent of the violence came as a shock.
As soon as we were inside, we realised the full extent of the conflict.
Goldman, and to an extent JPMorgan, are winning basically because they have less competition.
